The '''''Harmzuay''''' was a modified [[Kaloth-style battlecruiser|''Kaloth''-style battlecruiser]] that saw extensive service with the [[Thalassian slavers/Legends|Thalassian Slavers]].

==History==
The battlecruiser was modified enough that it could fight any [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] to a standstill. Modifications included adding [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]] and deck fighters, and increasing the armor thickness. The ship and its efficient crew made a strong argument to their future victims against resisting a Thalassian raid. The ship could also support at least two squadrons of [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]].

In [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]] during an attempt by the Thalassians to [[Battle of Algara|raid]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Kerilt]], the ''Harmzuay'' was accosted by the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Invidious]]''. Its commander, the renegade [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Leonia Tavira]], took great exception to the Slavers' attempt to encroach on what she saw as "rightfully hers" and used the vastly superior firepower of her ship to obliterate the old ''Kaloth'' cruiser.

==Appearances==
*''[[I, Jedi]]'' {{Ab|I, Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}}
